title: Let's Enjoy Math!
description: Let's experience the magic of numbers together!

scenes.speech: Does math look hard? It can actually be super fun! Let's dive in!
scenes.title: The Magic of Math!

scenes.speech: Addition means putting things together. What happens with 3 apples and 2 apples?
scenes.title: Addition
scenes.content: 3 + 2 = 5. When you combine 3 and 2, you get 5! Addition is all around us every day.

scenes.speech: Subtraction means taking away. You have 8 cakes and eat 3 — how many left?
scenes.title: Subtraction
scenes.content: 8 - 3 = 5. When you take some away, you use subtraction! Useful for counting change at a store.

scenes.speech: Multiplication is the fast way to add the same number many times!
scenes.title: Multiplication
scenes.content: 4 × 3 = 12. That's 4 added three times! Once you learn the times tables, math becomes lightning fast.

scenes.speech: Division is the fair way to share things equally!
scenes.title: Division
scenes.content: 12 ÷ 4 = 3. Divide 12 into 4 equal groups and each gets 3! Perfect for sharing pizza.

scenes.speech: Fractions show a part of something whole. Like slicing a pizza!
scenes.title: Fractions
scenes.content: 1/2 means one out of two equal parts. 3/4 means three out of four. Used in cooking and shopping every day!

scenes.speech: Percent means 'out of 100'. A 50% discount means half price!
scenes.title: Percentages (%)
scenes.content: 100% = everything, 50% = half, 25% = a quarter. Used in test scores, sales, and bank interest!

scenes.speech: Geometry is math about shapes and space!
scenes.title: Geometry: Shapes
scenes.content: Triangles have 3 sides, squares have 4 equal sides, circles have no corners. Geometry is in buildings, art, and nature!

scenes.speech: Math is used by doctors, architects, scientists, and programmers!
scenes.title: Math Powers the World
scenes.content: Coding, finance, architecture, and science all need math. Learning math is the best investment you can make!

scenes.speech: You learned the basics of math and so much more. Keep practicing — you'll get amazing!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
